action: Add Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 to Rust repos lacking cargo caching in CI

repos.name: PhenoKits
repos.matrix_key: matrix.rust (placeholder; PhenoKits ci.yml has no Rust matrix, but shared-key still resolves safely to 'cargo-')
repos.notes: Inserted between actions/checkout and the first cargo metadata step. PhenoKits ci.yml uses cargo metadata (not cargo build) for repo hygiene validation; rust-cache still useful for the cargo metadata and any future cargo invocations.

repos.name: phenoShared
repos.matrix_key: matrix.rust-version (matches the strategy.matrix.rust-version key in the reusable workflow)
repos.notes: Reusable Rust CI workflow. rust-cache step inserted after actions/checkout and before Setup Rust; placed before toolchain so cache is warm when cargo build/test/clippy run.

repos.name: PhenoMCP
repos.matrix_key: matrix.rust (placeholder; PhenoMCP has no matrix but shared-key is consistent with org template)
repos.notes: Inserted into the 'rust' job of the polyglot CI; python job unchanged.

repos.name: phenoRuntime
repos.matrix_key: matrix.rust (placeholder; phenoRuntime has no matrix but shared-key is consistent with org template)
repos.notes: Inserted into the 'rust' job of the polyglot CI between actions/checkout and dtolnay/rust-toolchain.

repos.name: Tracely
repos.matrix_key: matrix.rust (placeholder; Tracely uses single toolchain 'stable' but shared-key retained for future matrix expansion)
repos.notes: Replaced the legacy actions/cache@v4 step (which manually cached ~/.cargo/registry, ~/.cargo/git, target via hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock')) with Swatinem/rust-cache@v2. Net delta: +4/-8 lines, but adds Swatinem's content-addressed caching and automatic restore-keys.

repos.name: Pyron
repos.matrix_key: matrix.rust (placeholder; libs-activation-ci has no matrix but shared-key retained for consistency)
repos.notes: Pyron's ci.yml already has Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 (9 invocations). Added it to libs-activation-ci.yml (path-triggered on libs/** changes) which runs cargo build --release for phenotype-auth and phenotype-observability. The CI is JS-only was an audit concern; this is a real cargo build pipeline that previously recompiled from scratch on every path-filtered push.

repos.name: FocalPoint
repos.notes: FocalPoint's ci.yml already has Swatinem/rust-cache@v2. Added to journey-gate.yml which runs `cargo install phenotype-journey --locked` to bootstrap the journey CLI; caching the cargo registry shrinks that install step substantially.

repos.name: agentapi-plusplus
repos.notes: agentapi-plusplus is primarily Go, but its fuzzing.yml runs `cargo install cargo-fuzz` and `cargo fuzz run all` against any .rs files in the repo. Added rust-cache to speed up the cargo install step on cron-scheduled fuzz runs.

skipped.name: localbase3
skipped.reason: Constraint unsatisfiable. localbase3 has no Rust workflows (only test.yml + trufflehog.yml), no Cargo.toml, and zero 'rust'/'cargo' references anywhere in .github/workflows/. The user's stated preference for 'localbase3 Go side' confirms the Go side of the polyglot (localbase-chain) is the target, but that runs on Cosmos SDK and has no cargo workflow either.
skipped.alternative_considered: Could add a new fuzzing/cargo workflow, but task scope is 'add rust-cache to existing workflows', not 'create new workflows'. Out of scope.

selection_rationale.constraint: Repos from L1 audit set that have a Rust/cargo workflow AND do not use Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 in that workflow
selection_rationale.resolution_strategy: Where user preference name had a candidate workflow without rust-cache (Pyron libs-activation-ci, FocalPoint journey-gate, agentapi-plusplus fuzzing.yml, PhenoKits ci.yml), use it. Where preference had no Rust at all (localbase3), document the skip. Filled the remaining 4 slots with best-fit Rust repos (phenoShared, PhenoMCP, phenoRuntime, Tracely) that lacked rust-cache.
mismatch_notes: Pyron's ci.yml already has Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 (9 invocations); used libs-activation-ci.yml instead.
FocalPoint's ci.yml already has Swatinem/rust-cache@v2; used journey-gate.yml instead.
agentapi-plusplus is Go-primary; only has Rust code via cargo-fuzz target in fuzzing.yml.
localbase3 has no Rust at all in .github/workflows/.

branch_label_corrected_post_automation.PhenoKits: A parallel forge agent checked out chore/ci-timeout-2026-06-08 onto the shared PhenoKits working tree after my initial commit landed; force-moved branch chore/ci-cargo-cache-2026-06-08 to point at commit cc572f7a (verified via git show).
